title: Brand Campaign
description: A high-energy commercial campaign for Virat Kohli's lifestyle brand ONE8. The project demanded seamless integration of live-action footage with CGI environments, creating an aspirational visual language that matched the athlete's intensity and precision.

title: Just Do It — India
description: VFX supervision for Nike's Indian market campaign. Complex compositing work combining multiple shoot locations with digitally enhanced environments. Every frame engineered to embody the relentless spirit of the brand.

title: Ryzen Launch
description: CGI product visualization for AMD's Ryzen processor launch. Photorealistic chip renders with abstract particle systems representing raw computational power. Technical precision meets visual poetry.

title: Wrapped Campaign
description: Motion design direction for Spotify's annual Wrapped campaign. Dynamic, data-driven visuals that transformed listening statistics into captivating animated sequences.

title: Home Stories
description: VFX work for IKEA's regional campaign. Invisible effects that enhanced real home environments while maintaining the brand's signature warmth and accessibility.

title: Above the Clouds
description: Supervising VFX for Qatar Airways' premium travel experience campaign. Seamless sky replacements, cabin enhancements, and that impossible-to-achieve luxury glow.

title: Genesis Collection
description: Creative direction for a generative art NFT collection. Building visual systems that could produce 10,000 unique pieces while maintaining artistic coherence.

title: The Blackout
description: A personal short film exploring memory and identity through fragmented narratives. Shot in Bangalore during lockdown, processed through analog and digital distortion.

title: Visual Identity
description: Complete visual identity and motion system for OKU, a decentralized social protocol. Clean, geometric, and built for infinite scalability.

title: Launch Campaign
description: VFX and motion graphics for Burst's market launch. High-frequency visuals that matched the platform's trading speed and intensity.
